title: Peppery Gooey Middle Eastern Tomato Stir-fry
description: A savory and spicy dish perfect for a sick day, combining the richness of tomato puree with the bold flavors of Indian spices.

ingredients.name: 2 medium tomatoes, pureed
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or canned, adjust quantity as needed

ingredients.name: 1 onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Use mild onions like shallots if available

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
ingredients.notes: To taste, may be omitted for halal-friendly dishes

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup bhuna spices (coriander powder, turmeric, and other mild spice mix)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté until softened, about 2 minutes.
Pour in the tomato puree and stir well for an additional minute.
Season with cumin, black pepper (if using), bhuna spices, and salt. Stir continuously to prevent sticking.
Simmer for about 5-7 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
